items.title: Shipwrecked: Nightmare at Sea
items.overview: Never-before-seen footage and survivor accounts trace the 2012 shipwreck of a luxury cruise and the disaster that ensued, in this immersive documentary.

items.title: Uprising
items.overview: Through an AI-driven reinterpretation of Mexican Revolution footage captured by the country's cinema pioneers, this documentary offers a fresh look at a pivotal historical moment. It traces the movement's rise, peak, and fall, the birth of a new nation, and invites us to question the narratives that

items.title: Filmmakers in Action
items.overview: What is the state of cinema and what being a filmmaker means? What are the measures taken to protect authors' copyright? What is their legal status in different countries? (Sequel to “Filmmakers vs. Tycoons.”)

items.title: Messi
items.overview: His teachers, coaches, childhood friends and Barça teammates, together with journalists, writers and prominent figures from the history of football, come together in a restaurant to analyze and pick apart Messi's personality both on and off the field, and to look back at some of the most significant

items.title: 1000 Men and Me: The Bonnie Blue Story
items.overview: Adult content creator Bonnie Blue announced that she’d slept with 1057 men in 12 hours. Exploring the polarising debate around Bonnie and the pornification of our society, the film follows her over the most eye-opening six months of her life.

items.title: Operación Palace
items.overview: Finally, 33 years later, the whole truth behind the attempted coup d'état that shook Spain on the afternoon of February 23, 1981, is revealed by those who lived through those dreadful hours; a deep look behind the heavy curtain which hides the real mastermind, waiting to be unmasked.

items.title: 3 Million
items.overview: In this joyous documentary about the passion of soccer, the iconic Uruguayan musician Jaime Roos and his son reunite to embark on a journey to the South African World Cup with the Uruguayan national soccer team.

items.title: The Other Side of The SEX
items.overview: A documentary that shines a spotlight on the unsung male performers who support the world of Japanese Adult Video, which has grown into a massive industry with annual sales of 55 billion yen in the 30 years since its inception. Its co-directors Enoki Yujiro and Takahara Hidekazu are JAV veterans who

items.title: J'ai tout donné
items.overview: An intimate cinéma vérité style documentary following  french mega star Johnny Hallyday's summer tour.

items.title: Alter Ego
items.overview: Young Newport woman Shyana Fleming balances her double life as a wrestler and a Welsh language teaching assistant.

items.title: American Exposé: Absence of Light
items.overview: An inside look at Satanism from its origins to its victims. Shot on location in Richmond, Virginia, to San Francisco, California, this program will enlighten and inform. By becoming aware, you will be able to spot the danger signals. You'll hear historical facts regarding the beliefs of Satanists, a

items.title: Miguel Ángel Blanco: The 48 Hours That Changed Spain
items.overview: This documentary explores how Miguel Ángel Blanco's 1997 abduction turned fear into collective resistance and shaped Spain's fright Against ETA terrorism.

items.title: Sweet Toronto
items.overview: Sweet Toronto is a documentary by D.A. Pennebaker of the Toronto Rock and Roll Revival, a one day festival held September 13, 1969 at Varsity Stadium on the campus of the University of Toronto and attended by some 20,000 persons. John Lennon played as part of the Plastic Ono Band, whose members also

items.title: The Last Duel
items.overview: Two geniuses destined to define an era collided on the same stage. This documentary explores the origins of the rivalry between Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi-the moment their confrontation transformed Spanish football and forever redefined greatness in the modern game.

items.title: Messi: The Forgotten Tape
items.overview: A VHS featuring Lionel Messi starts a tug of war between Spain and Argentina over his loyalty.

items.title: Jackass: Best and Last
items.overview: The fifth and final installment to Jackass franchise where the crew go on one last insane crusade.

items.title: Melania
items.overview: Offering unprecedented access to the 20 days leading up to the 2025 Presidential Inauguration — through the eyes of the First Lady-elect herself — step inside Melania Trump's world as she orchestrates inauguration plans, navigates the complexities of the White House transition, and reenters public l

items.title: Fotbollsåret 2023
items.overview: Follow the national teams behind the scenes in exclusive clips and personal portraits that celebrate Sweden's greatest football stars. Joy and sadness alternate and it all culminates in the awarding of the Gold and Diamond Balls.

items.title: Omega Man: A Wrestling Love Story
items.overview: Tyson Smith, better known as his in-ring name Kenny Omega, took the long and unorthodox road to achieve his dream of pro wrestling stardom. Follow his journey to the top of the wrestling world as he defies not only the odds but people's preconceived ideas of what a professional wrestler can be.

items.title: The Crash
items.overview: A teen slams her car into a building, killing her boyfriend and his friend. What seems like a tragic accident becomes a murder case.

items.title: Austin City Limits
items.overview: Now the longest-running music series in American television history, ACL showcases popular music legends and innovators from every genre.

items.title: Galileo
items.overview: This daily German magazine show delivers interesting facts on numerous topics centering around technology, life, and bizarre knowledge.

items.title: Bares für Rares
items.overview: In the show, selected applicants each present a curiosity, rarity or antique they have brought with them. Once they have received their expertise, they will have the opportunity on site to offer their exhibit to a changing five-person podium for sale and, ideally, to sell it to the highest bidder fo

items.title: Panorama
items.overview: Current affairs programme, featuring interviews and investigative reports on a wide variety of subjects.

items.title: Australian Story
items.overview: Putting the "real" back into reality television, Australian Story is an award-winning documentary series with no narrator and no agendas — just authentic stories told entirely in people's own words.

items.title: BBC Proms
items.overview: The World's Greatest Classical Music Festival.  The BBC Proms is a classical music festival held every summer at the Royal Albert Hall in London, and in recent years has explored an innovative series of Proms around the UK with concerts in all four nations. Its aim: to bring the best in classical mu

items.title: Horizon
items.overview: Horizon tells amazing science stories, unravels mysteries and reveals worlds you've never seen before.

items.title: Democracy Now!
items.overview: A United States daily progressive, nonprofit, independently syndicated program of news, analysis, and opinion.

items.title: World Theme Tour
items.overview: The World Theme Journey is a program designed to deliver living experiences that only free backpackers can feel, away from simple travel information programs. From Spain to Chile, South Africa to Alaska, the world-themed trips are made by running on their own feet, vividly showing the splendid cultu

items.title: The Mark of Beauty
items.overview: Show discusses a variety of everyday art and craft items from Japan. Each episode covers a single item in depth to explain the hidden beauty in the items history and making.

items.title: Arena
items.overview: Arena is a British television documentary series, made and broadcast by the BBC. Voted by leading TV executives in Broadcast as one of the top 50 most influential programmes of all time, it has run since 1 October 1975 with over five hundred episodes made, directed by the likes of Martin Scorsese, A

items.title: Great Performances
items.overview: The best in the performing arts from across America and around the world including a diverse programming portfolio of classical music, opera, popular song, musical theater, dance, drama, and performance documentaries.

items.title: 37 Grad
items.overview: 37° reports on typical life situations in our society from an unusual perspective: the camera accompanies a group or individual people, usually in a particularly exposed social situation. The reportage often outlines a turning point or a decision-making phase in the biography under review.
